InviteMessageTemplate.EmailSubject: You've been invited to UK Fuel Finder
InviteMessageTemplate.EmailMessage:
Welcome to UK Fuel Finder

You've been invited to access the UK Fuel Finder dashboard — a tool for exploring and analysing live fuel prices across the UK.

Your login details:

  • Username: {username}
  • Temporary password: {####}

Sign in at fuel.hoyland.xyz and you'll be prompted to set a new password on first login.

If you weren't expecting this email, you can safely ignore it.

This invitation was sent by an administrator of UK Fuel Finder.
